about: I'm a passionate developer with experience in building web applications using modern technologies.
In my free time, I enjoy exploring new programming languages, contributing to open-source projects, and staying updated with the latest trends in the tech industry.
Feel free to reach out to me for collaboration or just to say hi!

timeline.content: First exposure to computers, no programming knowledge.
Learned C, C++, built logical thinking and basic algorithms.
Worked with C#, WinForms, SQL Server, built small study apps.
Moved into Web: HTML, CSS, JS, ASP.NET.
Exploring Svelte, React, Tailwind, building personal projects.
Focusing on improving mindset and practical skills.

quotes.text: Every person takes the limit of their own field of vision for the limits of the world.
quotes.author: Arthur Schopenhauer

quotes.text: The only true wisdom is in knowing you know nothing.
quotes.author: Socrates

quotes.text: Do not take life too seriously. You will never get out of it alive.
quotes.author: Elbert Hubbard

quotes.text: In the middle of difficulty lies opportunity.
quotes.author: Albert Einstein

quotes.text: Anxiety is the dizziness of freedom.
quotes.author: Soren Kierkegaard

quotes.text: Sometimes you build walls not to keep people out, but to see who cares enough to break them down.
quotes.author: Socrates

quotes.text: The best way to predict the future is to invent it.
quotes.author: Alan Kay
